name: insane-design-codex
description: Codex-native design system analyze / apply / build / export — extract real CSS into design.md + report.ko.html, apply a design to an existing project, scaffold new artifacts, and export DTCG tokens.json.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze, apply, build, and export real design systems in Codex
interface.longDescription: Package the Codex-native `insane-design` (analysis + DTCG export), `insane-apply`, and `insane-build` skills with the bundled example corpus, helper scripts, starter components, and the v3.2 `design.md` contract. Menu selections use the numbered-options chat pattern instead of card UIs; verification is synchronous.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this site and generate a reusable design.md plus report.ko.html.
Apply the stripe design.md to my existing landing page, keeping the content.
Build a new landing page from this design.md and the starter components.
Export this design.md frontmatter to a DTCG tokens.json.
